content.description:
Field editor for item reference (GUID) fields. Displays the referenced item's name and provides a search modal for selection. Used by [generic-editor](item://ffd688d1-93a8-4c4b-b09a-127b249294f5) for fields with `editor: 'itemref'`.

## Features

- Shows item name (or ID snippet) for current selection
- "Select..." button opens modal with [item-search-lib](item://6734035b-e30b-4c2a-829e-d57b3d1fd5dc) search UI
- Clear button to remove selection
- Validates references and shows error for invalid GUIDs

## Options

- `readonly`: Hides select/clear buttons
- `modalTitle`: Custom title for selection modal
- `searchPlaceholder`: Custom placeholder text
- `targetContainer`: Restrict search to attachments of a container
